dialogue_line_replacements.text: Desde mi perspectiva, el trabajo remoto ofrece mucha más flexibilidad y autonomía. Para mí eso es clave.
dialogue_line_replacements.translation: From my perspective, remote work offers much more flexibility and autonomy. For me that's key.

dialogue_line_replacements.text: No lo dudo. De hecho, muchas empresas han mejorado su productividad con el modelo híbrido. Eso está claro.
dialogue_line_replacements.translation: I don't doubt it. In fact, many companies have improved productivity with the hybrid model. That's clear. (PR: 'eso está claro' common affirmation)

cultural_notes_overrides.formality: Puerto Ricans are direct and expressive in debate. Raising your voice slightly signals passion, not anger. '¡Exacto!' and '¡Claro que sí!' are enthusiastic agreement markers used constantly.
cultural_notes_overrides.regional_variations: 'Brutal' in PR can mean 'awesome' (positive) as well as 'terrible' depending on context and tone. '¡Qué brutal!' = 'That's amazing!' in casual Puerto Rican debate. '¡Wepa!' is a PR-specific exclamation of enthusiasm.
